ValidationRule.description: Only allow a Fundraiser to select the Status Values including Accepted Verbal Invite, Declined Verbal Invite, Request Alternate Date, or Canceled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
NOT(ISNEW()),
OR(ISPICKVAL( nd_Status__c , "AP"), ISPICKVAL( nd_Status__c , "Z"), ISPICKVAL( nd_Status__c , "G"), ISPICKVAL( nd_Status__c , "A"), ISPICKVAL( nd_Status__c , "X")),
NOT(OR(
$Profile.Name = "System Administrator", $Permission.Edit_Campaign_Event_Nomination_Status, $User.ND_Bypass_Duplicate_Rules__c = TRUE) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a Status value of Accepted Verbal Invite, Declined Verbal Invite, or Request Alternate Date
